description: Reusable workflow graph for swarm-autonomous refine — MAP = TERRAIN; extend ass-ade/aaaa-nexus before parallel mechanisms.

orderedNodes.action: Map MCP manifests, Cursor hooks, ASS-ADE CLI extensions (aso, epiphany, gates); list deltas vs prior commit.
Minimal integration glue; keep imports monadic; add or extend tests.
Manifest diff summary, backward-compat notes, rollback path; verify no embedded secrets.
Independent read of public surfaces (mcp.json, hooks, server.json).
Full terrain map including Nexus delegation depth and MCP tool registry.
CI/feature flags, staged rollout, observability hooks.
Stateful clients, compose a2/a3 modules; no secrets in repo.
Named tests + rollback drill documented in PR.

rollbackHints.cursorHooks: Restore from git: the repo or dotfiles branch that owns hooks.json; or remove the last afterFileEdit block and re-run suite sync.
rollbackHints.cursorMcp: Revert ~/.cursor/mcp.json from VCS backup; re-run setup_cursor_atomadic.py to merge manifests.
rollbackHints.assAdeSwarmConfig: git restore .ass-ade/swarm/config.json (or copy prior JSON from PR description).
rollbackHints.assAdeAsoLogs: Logs under .ass-ade/aso/logs/ are disposable; delete to reset ASO telemetry drafts.

secretsPolicy: No API keys or tokens in JSON, hooks, or commands — env vars only; document required env names in AGENTS.md or .env.example.
